_comment: Slot pattern (canonical-store-listings.md § Screenshot principles): slot 1 = core value prop (FUNCTION ONLY — never 'Free'/price/promo text; both Apple and Play reject price baked into screenshots, so the cost claim lives in the description, not the image), slot 2 = Josh Approved card (kind: card, no source), slots 3..N = features in descending priority. JA card stays in slot 2 even with fewer feature shots after. Framing: style=signature (accent ground + motif + floating device) is the studio default — the accent is read from src/theme/appAccent.ts; set a top-level `accent` only to override the marketing ground. Per-slot `layout` (hero|detail|bleed), `crop` (for detail), and `theme` (light|dark) add intra-carousel variety; see § Framing & visual style.
